casio-iq-1070j-7jf-radio-clock.description_append: **See also** [Casio IQ-1070J-7JF Radio Clock with original sticker](/en/sayonara/items/casio-iq-1070j-7jf-radio-clock-with-original-sticker/) — same model, includes the original ¥3,000+tax retail sticker.
casio-iq-1070j-7jf-radio-clock.note: Off-market 25 Jun 2026 — Rob keeps this (no-sticker) clock to use for now; it WILL sell before he leaves Japan (by June 2027), so the page's 'coming soon' state is intentional, not a bug. Stripe payment link was deactivated. To re-list: set for_sale true, then run `perl stripe_sayonara.pl --go --yes-live` (mints a fresh link) and `perl sayonara_generate.pl`.
